source.source_design_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/2-设计/<角色名>.md

local_sync.local_asset_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.<ext>
local_sync.download_command: libtv download -p <LIBTV_CANVAS_UUID> -n <LIBTV_NODE_ID_OR_NAME> -o projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成 | not_applicable_when_already_present_or_copied

libTV.output_image_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.<ext>
libTV.output_prompt_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.json

prompt_payload.prompt_source_policy: Use the upstream character design document's section `4. 解构` as the character source of truth. Do not use the former English integrated prompt from `提示词设计` as the imported source for Midjourney V8.1. Do not redesign identity, costume, era, style, narrative pressure, or body details.
prompt_payload.prompt_text: <LLM_AUTHORED_FROM_SOURCE_DECONSTRUCTION_SECTION_4; no script concatenation, regex phrasing, synonym rotation, batch insertion, or mapping projection>
prompt_payload.execution_wrap: LLM may add only libTV canvas-node execution framing and the required Midjourney suffix; framing must not invent identity, costume, era, narrative pressure, or scene facts.
prompt_payload.state_variant_policy: When asset_preflight.asset_reuse_decision is generate_state_variant, use Lib Image with the base reference node and describe only the state delta while preserving identity, costume system, render style, and 9:16 aspect.
prompt_payload.negative_prompt: no extra characters, no unrelated props as main subject, no redesign, no generic fashion editorial drift, no scene-dominant composition, no mixed identity, no inconsistent costume, no text blocks unless requested
